input.command:
python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('market.csv')
qids = ['200605', '240291']
for qid in qids:
    row = df[df['qid'].astype(str) == str(qid)]
    if len(row) > 0:
        r = row.iloc[0]
        print(f'Q{r[\"qid\"]}: {r[\"title\"][:130]} | Mkt: {r[\"market_aggregate\"]}')
# Also show what's left after March 24
active = df[~df['is_resolved']]
print()
print('Resolution dates remaining:')
print(active['resolution_date'].value_counts().sort_index())
"
